title: Luffy Refuses to Fear Fish-Men
description: On pages 5–8, luffy refuses to fear fish-men focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Cocoyashi villagers as arlong attacks with overwhelming fish-man strength while Luffy fights for Nami and the village.
scene: On pages 5–8, luffy refuses to fear fish-men focuses on Luffy, Arlong, Nami, Cocoyashi villagers as arlong attacks with overwhelming fish-man strength while Luffy fights for Nami and the village.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: How dare you use one of my brethren as your shield!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What're you talking about? You're the one who attacked him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: brother Luffy said he had a good idea...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Did he come up with a secret strategy or something?

summary: This part pushes the Arlong Park battle forward, clarifying who is fighting, what is at stake, and why Nami’s freedom matters.
